name: peps-drone-bridge
description: PEPS LIVE Drone RTMP Bridge local test build

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.local: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w frontend
